name: ESAB Corp
summary: General Founded in 1904, ESAB Corporation (ESAB, we or the Company), is a focused premier industrial compounder. ESAB provides its partners with fabrication technology advanced equipment, consumables, gas control equipment, robotics and digital solutions. The Companys rich history of innovative products and workflow solutions and our business management system, ESAB Business Excellence (EBXai), enables the Companys purpose of Shaping the world we imagine TM .
